title: Baker Ross FN254 Pearlised Ready Mixed Poster Paint Pack 150ml - Box of 6, Paint Value Pack of Bottles, Paint for Kids
features: Poster Paint for Kids: This set of water-based washable paint is perfect for children to paint on paper and card. Colours are pre-mixed, so kids can start painting straight away

Arts and Crafts for Kids: Creative boys and girls will enjoy painting their own designs and patterns with this paint at home, in school and in classrooms. These paints are perfect messy play and painting craft projects
Paint Bottles: Pair these paints with Baker Ross painting tools including paint brushes, water pots, canvases and more (not included). Colours come in a range of pearlised tones
Included in the Pack: This pack contains 6 bottles in 6 assorted pearlised colours - Blue, Pink, Green, Red, Yellow and Purple. This paint is not suitable as finger paint. 150ml per bottle

Made by Experts: Baker Ross has been designing and providing the very best art and craft supplies, and toys to schools, groups and parents for over 40 years. All products conform to General Product Safety Regulations, and state age recommendation where applicable.
description: From the manufacturer Vibrant Colours for Creative Fun Baker Ross Ready Mix Paint offers a wide range of bright, bold colours that are perfect for kids’ craft projects. These paints are ideal for bringing creative ideas to life, whether it’s painting pictures, decorating crafts, or adding finishing touches to school projects. The smooth consistency and vibrant pigments make every brushstroke stand out, ensuring stunning results every time. Easy to Use and Mess-Free Designed with convenience in mind, our ready-mix paints come pre-mixed and ready to go—no extra preparation needed! The paint is water-based, washable, and dries quickly, making clean-up a breeze. Perfect for home crafting, classrooms, or art parties, this paint is suitable for a variety of surfaces, from paper and card to wood and fabric. Perfect for Young Artists Whether your kids are beginners or budding artists, our ready-mix paint sets are designed for easy use, offering consistent, streak-free coverage. The resealable bottles help keep the paint fresh for future use, ensuring lasting creative fun. Watch as kids explore their imagination and express themselves with a rainbow of colours, ready to create their next masterpiece!
